'''ngahasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:micheelsenite|micheelsenite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:micheelsenite|micheelsenite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngahasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhæsæth|ngæhæsæth]] || [[word:ngæhæsæj|ngæhæsæj]] || [[word:ngæhæsæsh|ngæhæsæsh]] || [[word:ngæhæsæ|ngæhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahahasath|ngahahasath]] || [[word:ngahahasaj|ngahahasaj]] || [[word:ngahahasash|ngahahasash]] || [[word:ngahahasa|ngahahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahasath|ngahasath]] || [[word:ngahasaj|ngahasaj]] || [[word:ngahasash|ngahasash]] || [[word:ngahasa|ngahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahafsath|ngahafsath]] || [[word:ngahafsaj|ngahafsaj]] || [[word:ngahafsash|ngahafsash]] || [[word:ngahafsaf|ngahafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahasatha|ngahasatha]] || [[word:ngahasaja|ngahasaja]] || [[word:ngahasasha|ngahasasha]] || [[word:ngahasaka|ngahasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahasath|ngahasath]] || [[word:ngahasaj|ngahasaj]] || [[word:ngahasash|ngahasash]] || [[word:ngahasa|ngahasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahasathal|ngahasathal]] || [[word:ngahasajal|ngahasajal]] || [[word:ngahasashal|ngahasashal]] || [[word:ngahasakal|ngahasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahasathatha|ngahasathatha]] || [[word:ngahasajaja|ngahasajaja]] || [[word:ngahasashasha|ngahasashasha]] || [[word:ngahasaka|ngahasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahasathan|ngahasathan]] || [[word:ngahasajan|ngahasajan]] || [[word:ngahasashan|ngahasashan]] || [[word:ngahasakan|ngahasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahasathaoro|ngahasathaoro]] || [[word:ngahasajaoro|ngahasajaoro]] || [[word:ngahasashaoro|ngahasashaoro]] || [[word:ngahasakaoro|ngahasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
